_comment: Branding overlay for the VSCodium fork. Phase 1 step 4 applies this on top of the upstream microsoft/vscode product.json. Fields here override the upstream defaults; everything not listed is inherited.
_extensionMarketplace_comment: Phase 5 distribution decision. OpenVSX is the OSS-fork default; revisit if we self-host.
_builtInExtensions_comment: Inherit upstream's list (js-debug, etc.). Don't override — that wipes the marketplace-fetched built-ins. Our finkcode-core ships as a real folder under extensions/, not via this field.
_uiTheme_comment: Phase 1 step 4 — emerald accent on dark, matching the FinkSpace product card.
_finkcodeBootstrap_comment: Phase 1 step 7 — finkcode-core ships pre-installed (built into the app). Junctioned into vscode/extensions/ by build/apply-overlay.js.
